column3: "Annual meteorology since 1988 at the Bush Cabin
"short name codes A_B_C; A: 1 = MAIN MAST (4 m moved to 10 m on 18/01/2000); 2 = TIPPING BUCKET; 3 = ON THE CABIN; B = vertical position; C = replicate number"
"The height of the mast was increased in January 2000 to move the instruments above the trees growing near the site. The met sensors moved from ca 4 m to 10 m above ground level"
initial data flag for raw data that has had a simple range check
